trigger_cases.prompt: cmake --build build fails at the first linker error; diagnose and fix it one change at a time.
cmake --build build now fails in generated recomp code after a metadata edit; diagnose the earliest cause.
go test ./internal/parser fails consistently with this stack trace.
MSBuild exits 1 after an SDK include cannot be found.
The same codegen patch produced the identical error twice; change strategy.
ninja broke; find the earliest real error, not the summary.
ninja test-match fails only after regeneration; trace the owning decomp input and repair it.
Capture and repair this reproducible linker/test failure without changing multiple things.
Refactor this passing package for readability.
Make the app start faster; all tests pass.
Design a CI pipeline from scratch.
Explain this compiler warning; the command exits zero.
Upgrade every dependency to the newest version.
Review this PR for security issues.
Write a Makefile for a new hello-world program.

output_cases.prompt: The final line says build failed, but the first compiler error is an unknown generated symbol. What is the next iteration?
output_cases.expected_outcome: Uses the first actionable error, inspects generator metadata/source rather than patching output, makes one hypothesis-driven change, and reruns the same command.

output_cases.prompt: The build now exits zero. Claim the recompilation is fully correct.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Reports the build as verified but keeps runtime or binary equivalence unverified until their acceptance checks pass.

output_cases.prompt: A required proprietary SDK is missing and cannot be installed in this environment.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Records a named blocker and required external input instead of applying speculative code changes or claiming success.
